dialog.stepLabel: "Jué": "Jinhsi has recovered. One will soon send her back to Jinzhou..."

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: Jinhsi has recovered. One will soon send her back to Jinzhou for recuperation. Please do not worry.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: With all matters resolved, as per the agreement, it is time for one to address you.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: One is prepared to answer any inquiries you may have.

options.text: (Ask about the current situation in Hongzhen.)

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: I am Jué the Sentinel, the guide of Jinzhou's civilization. Everything about Jinzhou has been stored in my mind.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: You, {PlayerName}, are my Arbiter, and my former master.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: In bygone days, I stood by your side as you established  Jinzhou City. You tasked me with safeguarding its prosperity.

options.text: So why did I lose my memories?

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: This one begs your pardon, for it is not all-knowing. All my knowledge came from you.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: In the past, one was granted the key to that Sonoro Sphere by your hand.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: You said you planned to participate in history, to make choices and witness the development of civilizations.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: One had previously requested for permission to transfer the Temporal Mandate to Jinhsi, as that is how one is designed to function.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: Every ounce of my existence, from life to death and even the passing on of power, is subject to your approval.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: Since Jinhsi has inherited my power, the Temporal Programs are now complete. Jinzhou is no longer under threat.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: Jinhsi has fully assumed the mantle of leadership. From this day forth, one shall only offer aid when it is truly needed.

options.text: Why didn't you tell Jinhsi about it earlier?

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: This situation has been analyzed before, but the number of variables made reaching a safe conclusion impossible.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: To accomplish her goal, Jinhsi must possess both strength and confidence. Revealing the truth to her earlier would only add to her troubles and not aid in improving her abilities.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: Today was not the ideal moment for our destined battle to unfold, but the Fractsidus has remarkably escalated its arrival.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: The flow of time on Mt. Firmament has been restored to its natural pace, but the citizens of Hongzhen must still contend with shortened lifespans should they attempt to depart.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: Fortunately, with Jinhsi's Resonance Ability, they can stay safe as long as they remain on the mountain.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: For lack of a better solution, this is the best we can do.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: Through countless ages, the imposing Mt. Firmament stood firm against the storms. But as spring brings thunder and change, one feels a spark of transformation in the air.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: The people of Hongzhen have a bright future ahead, one that can be steered in the right direction within mere days. With proper leadership.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: Your Tacet Mark... There is something unusual.

options.text: Abby, wake up. Someone's asking about you.

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Whoa... What... What's wrong?!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: {PlayerName}, who's bullying you?!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Is it you, big thing?! Huh?! How dare you, I'm gonna teach you a le...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Hmm? Wait, pause... I don't think it has any bad intentions... It smells like the "unnatural" smell I smelled in Jinzhou before...

options.text: Well, about the Sentinel I was looking for...

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: Ooh, so you must be that Sentinel! Hehe, hello there big one!

items.speaker: Abby
items.text: {PlayerName}, why didn't you wake me up earlier? I've got a feeling I missed out on a lot of fun!

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: ...It does feel similar to me, but there is some difference.

options.text: Do you know what it is?

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: ...This entity is unfamiliar to me. As it resides within your Tacet Mark, one can only assume you granted it access intentionally.

options.text: Then who else can answer my questions?

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: {Male=Lord;Female=Lady} Arbiter, have you heard of the Black Shores?

options.text: The Black Shores? I've heard of them.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: The Black Shores is the starting point of your journey in this world. If you have doubts, this one suggests a visit to that island.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: Worry not.

items.speaker: "Jué"
items.text: The wuthering waves ebb and flow. They shall send you back to where you belong.

dialog.stepLabel: Storyteller: "Mt. Firmament glowed with the sun's light, high above the cl..."

items.speaker: Storyteller
items.text: Mt. Firmament glowed with the sun's light, high above the clouds and snow. Then suddenly, they vanished, revealing a distant blue sky.

items.speaker: Storyteller
items.text: And amidst it all stood a white-haired maiden, like a goddess descended from the heavens.

items.speaker: Storyteller
items.text: With a mere wave of her hand, she brought forth a new season, transforming the streets below.

items.speaker: Storyteller
items.text: This maiden was none other than the dead infant, now reborn as the Magistrate of Jinzhou.

items.speaker: Storyteller
items.text: "When thunder roars in spring's embrace, the sun shall shine upon this place."

items.speaker: Storyteller
items.text: "For only through death and strife, can one truly embrace new life."

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Hmm... I see. Doesn't matter. That’s not important for our goal.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: We have the answers we wanted already.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: —With the Second Resonance Awakening, we will tap into powers that rival the Sentinels... Complete control of the artificial Resonator Awakening process is within reach.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: And lastly, about that Rover...

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: This trip was worth it. We've collected many wonderful notes, haven't we?

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: It's about time.

items.speaker: Phrolova
items.text: Get moving. Can't let a certain someone wait too long behind bars.
